How to rename files automatically

Files like IMG_1234.jpg or document_final_v2.pdf make it difficult to find what you need. Over time, poorly named files create confusion.

Renaming files manually is slow and repetitive. Many users look for a way to rename files automatically.

Automatic file renaming

Foldora is an AI file organizer that automatically renames files based on their content. It generates clear, readable filenames to improve organization.

  • Generate meaningful filenames automatically
  • Improve file search and clarity
  • Works locally on your computer

How it works

  1. Select a folder
  2. Analyze files
  3. Preview new names and apply

Is it safe?

Foldora allows you to preview all renaming changes before applying them. No files are uploaded, and everything runs locally.

Learn more

  • Clean Downloads folder
  • Organize files on Windows
  • Organize files on macOS

👉 Rename your files automatically with Foldora.
